title: Image To Image K-Pop Choreography Storyboard AI
sourceTitle: Image To Image Kpop Choreography Storyboard AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image 4x4 16-panel choreography storyboard using same character sheet before tennis-core K-pop dance storyboard generation, built around Tennis-core K-pop dance choreography storyboard. Subject: same dancer face, tennis-core outfit, proportions, lighting, court setting, and panel-to-panel design language across all 16 panels supplies the swappable consistency rule detail for this template. young adult East Asian female K-pop idol dancer wearing a white cropped polo, light pink pleated tennis skirt, white socks, white sneakers, and subtle pink headband remains consistent across all 16 panels with the same face, hairstyle, outfit, body proportions, skin texture, and expression style. Scene: 4x4 16-panel choreography storyboard showing continuous dance poses, step transitions, arm gestures, turns, jumps, and camera rhythm provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. bright summer outdoor tennis court, blue sky, natural sunlight, tennis net, clean court lines, and fresh sporty atmosphere stays consistent across the storyboard with bright summer court light, blue sky, tennis net, clean lines, and fresh sporty atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 4x4 storyboard grid with 16 clearly different choreography beats, readable full-body motion, panel-to-panel continuity, and video-generation-ready pose progression. Signature Elements: Run-in opening, power smile pose, side shuffle, hair flip, arm swing hit, drop bounce, cross step, full spin, jump accent, wave, kick step, low lunge, rise sweep, diagonal, cheer jump, and idol ending pose. Style: Highly realistic K-pop dance storyboard, clean character-sheet consistency, dynamic choreography planning, sporty tennis-core fashion, natural sunlight, and polished production-board finish. Color Palette: Fixed tennis-core white, light pink, court blue, sunlit skin tones, clean green court accents, and bright summer daylight. Lighting: Natural summer sunlight with crisp court shadows, consistent exposure across all panels, and readable dancer face and outfit. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Scene: 4x4 16-panel choreography storyboard showing continuous dance poses, step transitions, arm gestures, turns, jumps, and camera rhythm provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. bright summer outdoor tennis court, blue sky, natural sunlight, tennis net, clean court lines, and fresh sporty atmosphere stays consistent across the storyboard with bright summer court light, blue sky, tennis net, clean lines, and fresh sporty atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 4x4 storyboard grid with 16 clearly different choreography beats, readable full-body motion, panel-to-panel continuity, and video-generation-ready pose progression. Signature Elements: Run-in opening, power smile pose, side shuffle, hair flip, arm swing hit, drop bounce, cross step, full spin, jump accent, wave, kick step, low lunge, rise sweep, diagonal, cheer jump, and idol ending pose. Style: Highly realistic K-pop dance storyboard, clean character-sheet consistency, dynamic choreography planning, sporty tennis-core fashion, natural sunlight, and polished production-board finish. Color Palette: Fixed tennis-core white, light pink, court blue, sunlit skin tones, clean green court accents, and bright summer daylight. Lighting: Natural summer sunlight with crisp court shadows, consistent exposure across all panels, and readable dancer face and outfit. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
